description: Create a comprehensive, multi-file Talon voice command package for managing windows and virtual desktops on Windows 11 in the directory %APPDATA%\Talon\user\win_management\. The package must consist of four files: `window_snap.talon` containing commands for Windows snapping shortcuts (including super-left, super-right, super-up, super-down, super-home, super-shift-left, super-shift-right, and corner snaps); `virtual_desktops.talon` containing commands for virtual desktop control and window switching (including super-ctrl-d, super-ctrl-f4, super-ctrl-left, super-ctrl-right, super-tab, alt-tab, alt-shift-tab, and alt-f4); `window_actions.py` defining custom Talon actions using @mod.action_class, importing from talon (Module, actions), and implementing user.snap_window_to_position(position: int) and user.focus_app_by_number(number: int); and a `README.md` documenting at least 20 commands across the package with sections for Title, Snap Commands, Virtual Desktop Commands, and Custom Actions.
